videos.headline: Texas wins in OT on Mason Shipley's FG
videos.description: Mason Shipley drills a game-winning field goal to give Texas an overtime win over Kentucky.

videos.headline: Steve Sarkisian wants Texas to improve execution after win vs. UK
videos.description: Sarkisian highlights his defense for their big goal-line stand in overtime against the Wildcats while acknowledging the Longhorns' need to capitalize on opportunities on offense.
